description_long: This is a stylized stone water well with a circular stone base and a wooden canopy supported by four posts. The roof is constructed from overlapping red clay tiles, with a slightly curved wooden beam at the top for added visual interest. A wooden crank mechanism with a handle and a rope is attached to one side, suspending a small wooden bucket over the well opening. The well sits on a roughly hewn stone platform, with a few loose stones scattered nearby. A small sign is placed to the side of the well, adding a touch of character and context to the scene.
description: A stylized stone water well with a red-tiled wooden roof, crank mechanism, and bucket, set on a stone platform with a side sign.
description_view_0: Front view showing the well's circular stone base, red-tiled roof, wooden crank, bucket, and a small sign to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the roof, the bucket on the well edge, and the sign's placement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the tiled roof and the stone base, with the crank mechanism less visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the wooden crank wheel and the rope mechanism, with loose stones visible on the ground.
attribute_presence_of_pulley_or_bucket_m: A wooden crank and rope mechanism with a small wooden bucket is present, attached to the side of the well.
attribute_surrounding_protective_structu: The well is surrounded by a low circular stone wall and covered by a wooden canopy with a tiled roof supported by four posts.
attribute_decorative_elements: Curved wooden beam atop the roof and a small sign beside the well.
